_comment: Mutation testing for the engine + store contract surface. Coverage % proves lines executed; this proves tests detect mutations. Baseline 2026-05-06 lifted from 72.77% to 94.20% after a four-commit pass that hardened useCombatStore (27→94), useGameStore (60→86), engine actions (86→96), ai (84→98), rules (95→99), and color (83→90). A second 2026-05-06 pass added targeted tests for useGameStore's three remaining combat.blocked.* templates, drawCard state mutation, and getLangGlobal value assertion — score moved 92.72→94.54 (useGameStore 79→88). Floor lifted from break=90 to break=92 alongside that pass. A third 2026-05-06 pass added two cmcMatches branch tests in color.test.ts — color.ts moved 89.61→92.21, total to 94.82. Remaining survivors are equivalent mutants: devtools enabled-flag (process.env.NODE_ENV in test runner), MAX_LOG `>` vs `>=` boundary (slice math equivalent), unused seed.priority/kind defaults (dead code shadowed by outer log() literals), and the MANA_SYMBOL_URL constants — those last six are tested via direct .toBe() assertions in color.test.ts but Stryker's coverageAnalysis 'perTest' assigns the module-load line to a non-color test, so the asserting test never runs against the mutant. Switching to 'all' would kill them at ~3× wall-clock cost; not worth the trade today. Not wired into npm run ci — full run is multi-minute; on-demand via npm run test:mutation, scheduled twice weekly via .github/workflows/mutation.yml.
